scripts.deploy:staging:user-application: pnpm run build:data-ops && pnpm run --filter user-application deploy:staging
scripts.deploy:production:user-application: pnpm run build:data-ops && pnpm run --filter user-application deploy:production
scripts.deploy:staging:data-service: pnpm run build:data-ops && pnpm run --filter data-service deploy:staging
scripts.deploy:production:data-service: pnpm run build:data-ops && pnpm run --filter data-service deploy:production
